positive: A stylized illustration of a celestial forest scene. The composition features geometric, symmetrical flora (like abstract trees and glowing flowers) set against a deep twilight sky. The main subject is a gentle, oversized constellation pattern that frames the central plant life. Style: Mid-century modern meets bioluminescent fantasy. Color palette: Deep indigos, vibrant turquoise, emerald green, and soft gold accents. Strong contrast between the glowing foreground elements and the dark background. Composition: Centered and visually balanced, ideal for repeating apparel patterns. Clean silhouettes, high detail, intricate linework, vectorized appearance.
